name: How do I challenge an AEO designation?
description: **Meet/confer + motion**: Prove no real confidentiality need.[1][5]

mainEntity.name: How do I challenge an AEO designation?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Meet/confer + motion**: Prove no real confidentiality need.[1][5]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Challenge by meet/confer, then motion showing designation lacks justification like no trade secret risk.**[1][5]

Courts balance protection against defense rights; plaintiffs can't prejudice defendants.[5]

- **Gather evidence**: Content doesn't warrant AEO.[1]
- **Show pattern**: Mass designations, late changes.[1]
- **Pro se extra step**: Protective order modification.[3]

List specific docs, explain harm to your case. Seek costs if opponent over-designated.
